title: Plum clafoutis
excerpt: Ingredients 800 g pitted fresh plums 60 g cake flour 2,5 ml baking powder 80 g castor sugar 3 extra-large eggs, beaten 250 ml milk 250 ml cream 5 ml vanilla essence icing sugar to dust over whipped cream to serve with Method Grease an oven dish with butter. Arrange your fruit …
html:
Ingredients

  • 800 g pitted fresh plums
  • 60 g cake flour
  • 2,5 ml baking powder
  • 80 g castor sugar
  • 3 extra-large eggs, beaten
  • 250 ml milk
  • 250 ml cream
  • 5 ml vanilla essence
  • icing sugar to dust over
  • whipped cream to serve with

Method

Grease an oven dish with butter.

Arrange your fruit in the oven dish.

Sift the flour, castor sugar and baking powder together.

Mix the cream, milk, vanilla essence and eggs.

Stir the milk mixture into the flour mixture.

Mix until smooth.

Using the back of a spoon, pour the batter over the fruit.

Bake for 40 minutes at 200 degrees Celsius.

Dust with sifted icing sugar and serve with whipped cream.

Easy!
